music.prompt: Clean, modern ambient background music, light percussion, warm bass, no vocals, professional tech product feel

cue.label: Kanban Overview
cue.voice: Kanbus is a high-level, accessible way to run Kanban directly from your repository.
You get a live board and a command line workflow, while everything stays grounded in plain files your team and AI agents can both use.

cue.label: Git Synchronization
cue.voice: Git synchronization is the core idea: use Git as the bus for Kanban boards.
Board updates become normal file changes, so review, history, branching, and collaboration work exactly the way your engineering team already expects.

cue.label: Feature Tour
cue.voice: From there, pick the capabilities you need: an agent-ready CLI, Jira synchronization, local tasks, virtual projects, and Beads compatibility.
You also get a VS Code plugin, an integrated wiki, and policy as code so humans and agents operate from one shared workflow.

cue.label: Get Started
cue.voice: Install Kanbus, connect your repository, and run the same board workflow for humans and AI agents.
